title: Power Axes
description: Unleash the power of the axes! ⚡🪓
body:
Currently, the Power Axes mod features two unique axes:

1.  **Nature's Cleaver** 🌿🪓 - Instantly cuts down all the surrounding trees with a single swing, perfect for rapid forest clearing!
2.  **Deforestation Axe** 🌳⚡ - Takes down an entire tree in seconds, saving you time and effort during your adventures.
3.  **Thor Axe** 🔥⚡ - Hurl this electrified axe to summon a storm of lightning, striking down all enemies in its path. It returns to your hand, crackling with power, ready to strike again!

  
**Power Dust Recipe**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182983/description_7c0a7129-368e-46db-a7ea-7ee30a24cc00.png)

**Deforestation Axe Recipe**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182983/description_8faf3f65-e35d-4e69-9074-269d58dc9165.png)

**Nature's Cleaver Recipe**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182983/description_040f6ffa-e4b5-4f4d-8048-54e3775f0a7c.png)

**Thor Axe Recipe**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182983/description_36f60bcb-d310-47e4-89a5-bb5bdbc00d9b.png)

Stay tuned! If the mod reaches a specific download milestone, exciting new axes will be added:

*   **Battle Axes** ⚔️🔥 - Powerful axes with combat abilities to dominate your enemies.
*   **Utility Axes** 🛠️✨ - Special tools to enhance your gameplay even further.

The adventure has just begun—help us reach this goal and unlock even more epic content!
